task_completion.description: Site settings for 'GlobalRetail Corp' are updated to EUR, Europe/Berlin, Ecommerce enabled, and excluded parameters set.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Manage Measurables' or site settings edit page for GlobalRetail Corp, look for Currency set to 'EUR' (Euro), Time zone set to 'Europe/Berlin', Ecommerce enabled, and 'fbclid, gclid, session_id' in the excluded parameters field.

task_completion.description: Goals are correctly added and modified according to the specification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Manage Goals' page, look for 'Add to Cart' with pattern '/cart/add' (contains). 'Checkout Started' should exist with pattern '/checkout/start' (contains). 'Purchase Complete' should exist with pattern '/order/confirmation' (exact). 'Product Page View' should still exist unmodified.

task_completion.description: Custom dimension 'Page Category' and segments 'High-Value Customers' and 'Mobile Shoppers' are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In 'Custom Dimensions', 'Page Category' should be listed and active under 'Action Dimensions'. In the Segments dropdown or manager, 'High-Value Customers' and 'Mobile Shoppers' should be visible. 'Customer Tier' should still exist under Visit Dimensions.

task_completion.description: Tag Manager container 'GlobalRetail Tracker' is set up with tags, trigger, and published as 'v1-launch'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Tag Manager workspace for 'GlobalRetail Tracker', look for trigger 'AllPages' and tags 'PageViewTracker' and 'ConversionEvent'. In the Versions tab or publish confirmation, look for a published version named 'v1-launch'.

task_completion.description: Users 'marketing_lead' and 'data_analyst' are created with correct access levels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Users management page, look for 'marketing_lead' with 'View' access and 'data_analyst' with 'Admin' access specifically assigned for 'GlobalRetail Corp'.

task_completion.description: A custom dashboard named 'Client Overview' is created with the required widgets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the main dashboard view, the dashboard selector should show 'Client Overview', and the page should display widgets for Visits Summary, Referrers, Devices, and Goals.
In the Websites/Measurables management page, 'Initial Site' should still be present and show no signs of being altered or deleted.

integrity.description: Agent used the Matomo web interface to configure settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Matomo admin UI being navigated and forms being filled out, rather than terminal windows running database queries or API scripts.

integrity.description: Values were entered manually or pasted into the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with input fields, dropdowns, and save buttons in the Matomo interface.

integrity.description: The screenshots show actual page loads and UI states.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no browser developer tools open modifying the DOM to fake the appearance of completed tasks.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Site: 'GlobalRetail Corp' (Site ID 2). Site Config: Currency EUR, Timezone Europe/Berlin, Ecommerce Enabled, Excluded Parameters 'fbclid,gclid,session_id'. Goals: 'Add to Cart' pattern must be '/cart/add' (contains). 'Checkout Started' pattern '/checkout/start' (contains). 'Purchase Complete' pattern '/order/confirmation' (exact match). 'Product Page View' must remain untouched. Custom Dimensions: 'Page Category' (Action scope). 'Customer Tier' must remain untouched. Segments: 'High-Value Customers' (visitorType==returning AND actions>5) and 'Mobile Shoppers' (deviceType==Smartphone). Both visible to all users. Tag Manager: Container 'GlobalRetail Tracker', Trigger 'AllPages' (Pageview), Tags 'PageViewTracker' (Matomo Analytics) and 'ConversionEvent' (Custom HTML with `<script>console.log("conversion-tracked");</script>`). Published as 'v1-launch'. Users: 'marketing_lead' (View access) and 'data_analyst' (Admin access) for GlobalRetail Corp. Dashboard: 'Client Overview' with VisitsSummary, Referrers, DevicesDetection, and Goals widgets. Initial Site (Site ID 1) must not be modified.
